## Context type

Union type that can be either rpc, indexer or full context.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type Context<MS extends MetadataStorage = MetadataStorage> = IndexerContext | RpcContext<MS> | FullContext<MS>;
```
**References:** [MetadataStorage](./sdk.metadatastorage.md)<!-- -->, [IndexerContext](./sdk.indexercontext.md)<!-- -->, [RpcContext](./sdk.rpccontext.md)<!-- -->, [FullContext](./sdk.fullcontext.md)
